full_text:
Deng Xuanzhi 鄧玄之
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Xuanzhi (鄧玄之)was born in Nanyang. Used by Lü Meng to persuade the Governor of Lingling to surrender the city. Deng Xuanzhi was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
